_readme: This is your world database. Each anchor is a 3D animation pinned to a real place. Types: portal, crystal, beacon, or model (with url to a .glb file). Edit coordinates to places near you for testing — get lat/lng by long-pressing any point in Google Maps.

anchors.name: Temple of Dawn portal
anchors.note: A golden gateway on the Chao Phraya riverside

anchors.name: Lumphini crystal
anchors.note: Hidden in the park near the lake

anchors.name: Victory beacon
anchors.note: A light column above the monument

anchors.name: Flying helmet (glTF demo)
anchors.note: Replace url with your own .glb model
